block_02: With regard to your request dated
block_04: Thank you for your request to DELETE your account and ALL of your personal data, made under Article 17 of the GDPR. Your personal information is very important to us and {{embedded.brand_name}} takes data protection very seriously. It is our goal to deliver the best services to our customers.
block_05: Account Deletion / Termination of Contractual Relationship
block_06: Further to your request, we have proceeded with the closing and blocking of your account as of
block_08: and our contractual relationship has been terminated effective immediately as of the date hereof.
block_10: Our systems are generally configured to comply the principles of data minimization and necessity, so that {{embedded.brand_name}} does not process any personal data from you which are not absolutely necessary for providing our services to you or in support of a law or regulation to which we are bound.
block_11: Having reviewed your request and our systems for your personal data, we note that all information currently held is required to be retained even after termination of our contractual relationship, under the following laws and regulations to which we are bound and which effectively override your right of erasure pursuant to Article 17 of the GDPR.
block_12: Legal Grounds for Retention and Retention Period
block_17: Prevention and Suppression of Money Laundering and Terrorist Financing Laws of 2007 (as amended)
block_23: If you have any questions or if you believe that your personal data is still being processed by {{embedded.brand_name}} without taking into account the principle of necessity, please let us know by following the steps prescribed in the Privacy Policy.
block_24: We reserve all our rights and remedies.
block_26: For any clarifications and/or any other information you may need, do not hesitate to contact us at
